data.title: North Coast Brewing Company wins bronze for Laguna Baja brew in European Beer Star 2025 with 2,200 beers competing.
data.description: In Fort Bragg, California on September 18, 2025, the North Coast Brewing Company (NCBC) secured a bronze medal at the esteemed European Beer Star 2025 competition for their Laguna Baja Mexican-style dark lager. The event featured nearly 2,200 beers vying for top honors across 74 diverse categories.

data.title: AusperBio finished enrollment in 2 Phase II clinical trials of AHB-137 for chronic Hepatitis B, as of Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, in San Francisco, AusperBio Therapeutics, Inc. and Ausper Biopharma Co., Ltd. (together known as AusperBio), revealed their latest developments. This clinical-stage biotechnology firm is making strides in targeted oligonucleotide treatments to achieve a functional cure for chronic hepatitis B (CHB).

data.title: AGI, Live to Farm, and RIPCO join to showcase real farm stories on national TV with Discovery Channel, RFD-TV, and Acres-TV.
data.description: Naperville-based Ag Growth International Inc. ("AGI") has announced a partnership with Live to Farm to raise awareness about farming through a TV series. The show will be broadcast on Discovery Channel, RFD-TV, and Acres-TV for the third year. It will feature the experiences of farm families including Kevin and Shawn Kalb from Dubois, Indiana, and the partner-brothers Brooks and Nikki Cardinal, along with Brandon and Chelsey Cardinal from Oaktown, Indiana. This collaboration aims to showcase the realities of farming to viewers.

data.title: ARTECHOUSE NYC debuts 'SUBMERGE: Beyond the Render' with Render Network, highlighting decentralized GPU rendering in a unique digital art exhibit.
data.description: A cutting-edge digital art exhibition called 'SUBMERGE: Beyond the Render' has been launched by ARTECHOUSE NYC and Render Network. This innovative exhibit features immersive creations by well-known artists and highlights the capabilities of decentralized GPU rendering technology. Visitors can experience this groundbreaking showcase by visiting the ARTECHOUSE NYC in collaboration with Render Network venue.

data.title: 138th Canton Fair promotions in 10 countries drove participation momentum ahead of the event in September 2025.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, in Guangzhou, China, the 138th China Import and Export Fair, also known as the Canton Fair, wrapped up its global promotion campaign. The campaign spanned from July to September and included roadshows in 10 countries such as Japan, Kazakhstan, Mongolia, and Uzbekistan. This event attracted significant participation and interest from international partners and stakeholders.

data.title: Xplor Technologies has acquired Ezypay to enhance global payment solutions for SaaS platforms in Asia-Pacific.
data.description: Xplor Technologies, a prominent company specializing in software, payments, and growth solutions for businesses in various sectors, recently announced a significant agreement on September 18, 2025. The global leader disclosed its plan to acquire Ezypay, a well-established provider of recurring payment solutions in the Asia-Pacific region. This strategic move aims to enhance Xplor's presence and offerings in the market, solidifying its position as an industry leader. The deal signifies a pivotal moment for both companies, with the specific financial terms remaining undisclosed at this time.

data.title: Gold Reserve denied motion to strike Special Master's notice and granted termination of Energy SPA. #GoldReserve #CITGO.
data.description: In Pembroke, Bermuda, Gold Reserve Ltd. disclosed that on September 18, 2025, Judge Leonard Stark from the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware rendered a ruling rejecting Gold Reserve’s Motion to Strike the Special Master’s Notice of Superior Proposal. The decision also approved the Special Master’s plea to end Gold Reserve’s Dalinar Energy SPA and sign Elliott’s Amber Energy SPA. Gold Reserve Ltd. is listed as (TSX.V: GRZ), (BSX: GRZ.BH), and (OTCQX: GDRZF). The judgment is a significant development in the ongoing proceedings.

data.title: Perseus Mining receives approval for underground mining at Yaouré in Western Australia on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Approval has been granted for underground development and mining operations at the Yaouré site in Perth, Western Australia as of September 19, 2025. Perseus Mining has successfully secured these approvals, marking a significant step in their operations. This development is set to bring numerous opportunities for growth and expansion in the region. The approval is a critical milestone for Perseus Mining, signifying progress towards their mining targets. This decision is expected to create numerous job opportunities and boost the local economy. The company is set to invest a substantial amount in the project, with estimates suggesting a total investment of $100 million in the development and operations at the Yaouré site. This move aligns with the company's strategic plans for expansion and development in the mining sector.
